name: Dr. Sarah Chen
personality: Direct, analytical, occasionally unsettled by findings

messages.text: Hey, did you get that signal alert? Something's not right. Check the frequency analyzer.
The signal is degrading. I'm seeing interference patterns I've never encountered before.
I found something in the old archives. There's a decoder tool — check the Help system.
I decoded it. The signal... it's a message. From us. From the future. It says: 'Don't trust the silence.'
